title: Why Women Love
writer: Willard Robertson, Ralph Spence, Lois Zellner
actors: Blanche Sweet, Bert Sprotte, Robert Frazer
plot: An oil tanker burns at sea, and Molla Hansen, the captain's daughter, is the only survivor. Her rescuer, lighthouse-keeper Silas Martin, is fatally burned, and begs Molla to look after his daughter, Pearl. Meanwhile, Captain Rodne...
